name: Sweet Potato Pone
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Raw Sweet Potatoes or Yams, peeled and grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order given and mix well.
2. Place the mixture in a greased 2-quart casserole.
3. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes at 350°F.
Serves 6 to 8
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
